title: GridPitchX Property
description: Specifies the X pitch of grids displayed in the vision sequence.
notes:
Specifies the X pitch of grids displayed in the vision sequence.  The unit depends on the GridUnits property.

Note:  If millimeter is specified in the GridUnits property, the grids are displayed only when calibration specified by the sequence is completed.

See Also: GridPitchX Property
